  -i, --input      Required. The paths to the input font files.

  -o, --output     Required. The path for the merged font file.

  -f, --format     The format for the merged font file.

  -l, --license    The path to the Aspose.Font .NET license file.

  -v, --verbose    (Default: false) Enable verbose output for detailed logging.
